mnemonics: MONGO-DB: Massive Online Network of Grouped Objects - Document Based
keyPoints: MongoDB is a NoSQL database that stores data in flexible, JSON-like documents
It is schema-less, meaning fields can vary from document to document
MongoDB uses collections instead of tables and documents instead of rows
commonMistakes: Thinking MongoDB requires a fixed schema like relational databases
Forgetting to create proper indexes leading to slow query performance
Using too many nested arrays making queries complex and inefficient
